message:
🌱 Refine default theme for professional production feel (#1698)

* 🌱 Refine default theme for professional production feel

Feedback: console looks "too AI-generated and gimmicky." This PR
changes the default experience to be calm and information-first
while preserving all effects as opt-in via themes.

Default theme changes:
- Disable starField, glowEffects, gradientAccents
- Neutral shadows instead of purple glow
- Add "KubeStellar Classic" theme for the original look

CSS refinements:
- Card hover: 1px lift / 12px shadow (was 4px / 40px)
- Card flash: reduced spread and opacity
- Pulse-glow: halved radius
- Remove unused float animation

Component changes:
- Remove Sparkles overlay from ConsoleAIIcon, Tour, NodeDetailPanel
- Replace Sparkles with Bot icon in SearchDropdown
- Simplify ContentLoadingSkeleton (remove fake stage messages)
- NavigationProgress: use theme primary color, remove pulse
- Replace animate-ping with animate-pulse on status dots

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Restyle AI/Actions bars as banners with minimize-to-pill

- CardRecommendations: banner layout, label "Recommended Cards for your clusters", minimize toggle
- MissionSuggestions: banner layout, label "Recommended Actions for your clusters", minimize toggle
- SmartCardSuggestions: neutralize purple styling, use Lightbulb icon
- Remove "AI:" and "Actions:" prefixes across all 9 locale files
- Replace purple accent colors with theme-neutral text-primary
- Both bars collapse to compact pills instead of dismiss/X

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Minimize shows inline pills; widget install opens export dialog

- Minimized view shows "Recommended Cards:" / "Recommended Actions:"
  with pill chips directly on the same row (no re-expand needed)
- Clicking a pill in minimized view expands banner and opens that item
- Dashboard nudge "Install widget" now opens WidgetExportModal instead
  of navigating to settings#widget-settings
- WidgetSettingsSection simplified to single button that opens the
  WidgetExportModal (better selection, preview, and download UX)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Widget export: default to templates/cluster-overview, fit content, add endpoint warning

- Default to Templates tab with Cluster Overview pre-selected
- Change fixed h-[550px] to max-h-[70vh] so modal fits content
- Add warning icon tooltip on API Endpoint explaining widgets require
  local or cluster-deployed Console
- Show inline warning + "install your Console locally" link when user
  is on console.kubestellar.io or Netlify preview
- Neutralize purple tab accents to use text-primary

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Increase settings scroll-to-section offset for better centering

SCROLL_OFFSET 16px → 80px so sections land with breathing room
instead of flush against the top. Accounts for demo banner and
provides better visual centering. Applied to both Settings.tsx
and UpdateSettings.tsx scroll helpers.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
